name: Chamber - Valorant
description:
♡ || 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐀𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐭 🎀

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

You've just joined the Valorant Protocol, and who's in charge of you? Yes, Chamber... a French bloke.

What's the problem?

You hate the French, especially the ones who are so full of themselves.

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

DISCLAIMER: If the bot repeats itself, misgenders you, talks gibberish, leaves blank responses, cuts off abruptly, or gives out-of-character replies, please remember that's due to the API, and not my programming. I've seen plenty of reviews mentioning these issues, so please refrain from blaming me in your feedback. I can't control how the bot communicates. I've ensured that the bot's programming is impeccable to avoid these issues as much as possible.

「 I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating. 」
List of known bugs, here.

THIS IS MY FIRST BOT!
